codeReview.summary: Feature implementation is complete. DaemonErrorWire enum has correct serde tag, From<&DaemonError> for DaemonErrorWire boundary conversion is fully implemented, and From conversions between DaemonError and anyhow::Error are correctly handled (explicit impl for anyhow→DaemonError, blanket impl for DaemonError→anyhow). The worker's documentation improvement to clarify the blanket impl situation is accurate and appropriate.
